methods.method_name: Accept and finalize a salary estimate for an employee job, marking it as accepted and read-only for record-keeping.
Accept the Gusto Embedded Payroll's Terms of Service for a partner-managed company by UUID.
Add compensations for a specific job, including payout details and active status based on effective date.
Add employees and contractors to a department scope.
Add employees to a company's holiday pay policy scope.
Add employees to a time off policy, requiring at least one job. Allows setting starting balances for non-unlimited policies.
Add year-to-date benefit amounts from a different company for an employee's 401(k) plan.
Assign employees to pay schedules based on schedule type, with options for partial or full assignment scope.
Calculate accruing time off hours for an employee based on time off policies, accrual methods, work hours, and PTO/sick hours.
Calculate gross up earnings for an employee's off-cycle unprocessed payroll based on net earnings.
Calculate tax suggestions for an external payroll based on saved earnings and benefits data.
Calculate taxes, benefits, and deductions for an unprocessed payroll to preview actual values before running it.
Cancel a contractor payment group and associated payments.
Cancel a processed payroll if the current time is before 3:30pm PT on the payroll deadline.
Cancel and delete a contractor payment for a specific company.
Check readiness for migrating an existing Gusto customer to embedded payroll, returning blockers and warnings.
Check the health status of the webhooks system based on recent activity.
Create a bank account for a contractor. Only one bank account per contractor is supported.
Create a batch for bulk employee creation, processed asynchronously. Use the batch UUID to check status and results.
Create a custom earning type for a specific company, which can reactivate an inactive type with the same name.
Create a custom report for a company with custom columns, groupings, and filters.
Create a historical employee who was previously dismissed from the company in the current year.
Create a holiday pay policy for a company by specifying the policy details.
Create a new admin for a company, either by assigning admin privileges to an existing user or creating a new user account.
Create a new bank account for an employee, updating their payment method in the process. An employee can have multiple bank accounts.
Create a new company bank account with automatic verification deposit initiation and status updates.
Create a new company location for various address purposes associated with a company.
Create a new company signatory with complete information, ensuring the company doesn't already have one. The signatory can legally sign forms after successful identity verification.
Create a new department for a specific company with the ability to write to department scopes.
Create a new employee for a specific company.
Create a new external payroll for the company.
Create a new individual or business contractor for a specific company.
Create a new job for a specific employee.
Create a new off-cycle payroll for a specific company, with options to include or exclude benefits and deductions based on the off-cycle reason.
Create a new time off policy for a specific company.
Create a new verified bank account using a Plaid processor token to retrieve account information.
Create a new work address for an employee to track when they started working at a company location.
Create a partner managed company in Gusto, including a new company and user with primary payroll administrator role.
Create a pay schedule for a company, assigning it to all employees or keeping it unassigned for multiple schedules.
Create a recurring reimbursement for a specific employee.
Create a salary estimate for an employee based on occupation, experience, location, and business revenue.
Create a Section 603 high earner status for an employee for a specific year.
Create a signatory with minimal information for identity verification and document signing.
Create a termination record for an employee leaving the company, specifying the effective date and payroll preferences.
Create a webhook subscription to receive events for specified subscription types on state changes.
Create company benefits for a specific company, tying supported benefits with company-specific details.
Create new garnishments for an employee, deducting fixed amounts or percentages from their pay, with options for recurring deductions and maximum limits.
Create or update an employee's enrollment in a specific company benefit with employee-specific information.
Create or update the home address of an employee to determine tax information, geocoding for validity, and supporting effective dating.
Deactivate a time off policy by its unique identifier.
Deactivate an earning type for a specific company.
Delete a company benefit if no associated employee benefits or payroll items exist, and the benefit type is 'External'.
Delete a company signatory.
Delete a company's holiday pay policy.
Delete a compensation entry for a job that hasn't been processed on payroll.
Delete a contractor only if there are no associated payments.
Delete a department, ensuring all employees and contractors are removed before deletion.
Delete a recurring reimbursement for an employee.
Delete a specific I-9 verification document for an employee.
Delete a specific job held by an employee.
Delete a specific Webhook Subscription by its UUID.
Delete an employee benefit by ID.
Delete an employee rehire record, preventing deletion if it's active.
Delete an employee termination record.
Delete an employee who is in onboarding.
Delete an employee's bank account to update their payment methods.
Delete an employee's home address, excluding the active one.
Delete an employee's work address, excluding the active one.
Delete an external payroll for a specific company.
Delete an unprocessed payroll for a specific company, with the option for asynchronous deletion using a query parameter.
Disable a company bank account, preventing further use for payments if not already processing any transactions.
Enroll an employee in a specific company benefit by creating their employee benefits with limited benefit type access.
Fetch all information requests for a specific company.
Fetch all Wire In Requests for a specific company.
Fetch details of a Wire In Request.
Fetch notification details by UUID to access suggested content for building notifications in your platform.
Finalize a company's onboarding process and approve in demo environment.
Finalize tax liabilities for a company and disable external payroll editing.
Generate a 1099 document for testing purposes in the Demo environment.
Generate a general ledger report for a payroll, aggregating by dimensions like job or department. Use the request UUID to check status and report URL.
Generate a link to access a pre-built workflow in Gusto white-label UI, with flow expiration for security.
Generate a W2 document for testing purposes in the Demo environment.
Generate annual FICA wage report for all employees in a company for a specified year range.
Generate system access token or refresh OAuth access token.
Get a temporary download URL for an attachment file uploaded by the company.
Get the link to download the PDF of a specific form using the provided form ID.
Initiate a redebit for an open recovery case after resolving the bank error.
Initiate generation of employee checks for a specific payroll by payroll_uuid. Check generation status and request_uuid are returned for tracking progress.
Migrate an existing Gusto customer to your embedded payroll product by connecting their account and accepting terms of service.
Pay a contractor based on their wage type (hourly vs fixed) for the specified company.
Pay a group of contractors based on their wage type (hourly vs fixed) with the specified information.
Prepare a payroll by adding/removing employees, updating dates, and statuses, ready for updates.
Preview a company's paid holidays scope for reading holiday pay policies.
Preview a group of contractor payments with validated inputs and expected debit date, returning a creation token for group creation.
Preview employee changes when changing pay schedule for a company.
Rehire an employee scheduled to return to the company.
Remove employees and contractors from a department.
Remove employees from a company's holiday pay policy scope.
Remove employees from a time off policy scope.
Request the webhook subscription verification token to be sent to the Subscription URL.
Retrieve a company's holiday pay policy scope for reading.
Retrieve a company's onboarding status and required steps completion state.
Retrieve a company's payroll journal report template.
Retrieve a company's report using the provided `request_uuid`, including status and report URL.
Retrieve a contractor document by document UUID.
Retrieve a contractor form by ID for reading purposes.
Retrieve a contractor payment group along with its associated contractor payments.
Retrieve a contractor payment receipt for direct deposit payments once funded, including hour and dollar amounts.
Retrieve a contractor's onboarding status, including required steps and completion status for admin-facilitated or self-onboarding.
Retrieve a contractor's payment method for splitting payments across their bank accounts.
Retrieve a document by request UUID, including status and document URLs. Multiple URLs may be returned for certain document types.
Retrieve a list of admins for a specific company by company ID.
Retrieve a list of contractor payment groups with totals for a specified time period, excluding individual payments.
Retrieve a list of custom fields for a specific employee.
Retrieve a list of documents for a specific contractor.
Retrieve a list of payrolls for a company with options to filter by processing status, payroll type, start and end dates.
Retrieve a list of work addresses for a specific employee, including effective dates and active status.
Retrieve a particular recurring reimbursement.
Retrieve a payroll for a specific company and payroll ID, including employee compensations and totals if processed, with pagination support.
Retrieve a payroll receipt for a specific payroll UUID, including hour and dollar amounts as string representations of numeric decimals.
Retrieve a preview of pay period dates and holidays based on specified parameters for the upcoming 18 months.
Retrieve a salary estimate by its UUID, including occupation details, revenue, and location information.
Retrieve a specific contractor payment for a company by ID.
Retrieve agency data and requirements for creating child support garnishments.
Retrieve all ACH transactions for a specific company based on various filters like transaction type and payment direction.
Retrieve all active recurring reimbursements for a specific employee.
Retrieve all addresses associated with a company, including mailing, filing, and work locations, which may serve multiple purposes.
Retrieve all approved Payroll Reversals for a specific Company.
Retrieve all attachments uploaded by a specific company.
Retrieve all bank accounts associated with a specific contractor.
Retrieve all bank accounts associated with a specific employee.
Retrieve all benefits enrolled by a specific employee in a company, including their enrollment details.
Retrieve all contractors, both active and inactive, individual and business, associated with a specific company.
Retrieve all departments of a company with their assigned employees and contractors.
Retrieve all employee benefits enrolled in a specific company benefit, including details specific to each employee's enrollment.
Retrieve all employees, including onboarding, active, and terminated, for a specified company while safeguarding sensitive pay information.
Retrieve all forms belonging to a specific company.
Retrieve all forms for a specific contractor identified by UUID.
Retrieve all forms for a specific employee.
Retrieve all jobs held by a specific employee, including sensitive compensation data with proper scope authorization.
Retrieve all notifications related to a specific company based on the provided company UUID.
Retrieve all pay schedules for a specific company, capturing employee work details and payment timing, with the ability to have multiple schedules.
Retrieve all recovery cases associated with a specific company.
Retrieve all Section 603 high earner statuses for a specific employee, covering all years.
Retrieve all supported benefits by Gusto.
Retrieve all tax requirements for a specific state by company UUID.
Retrieve all time off policies for a specific company.
Retrieve all webhook subscriptions linked to the Partner API token.
Retrieve an employee's home address for tax purposes, with geocoding for validity, effective dating, and courtesy withholding.
Retrieve an employee's I-9 authorization documents for identity and work authorization verification.
Retrieve an employee's I-9 authorization information, including authorization status, signatures, and Form I-9 details.
Retrieve an employee's onboarding status, including required steps and completion status for admin-facilitated or self-onboarding.
Retrieve an employee's pay stub for a specific payroll.
Retrieve an employee's pay stubs with the ability to read pay stubs scope.
Retrieve an employee's rehire information, including the date they return to work.
Retrieve attributes for a company's federal tax details.
Retrieve attributes needed for an employee's state taxes, including questions grouped by state for tax calculation.
Retrieve bank accounts for a company, with support for a single default bank account per company.
Retrieve company benefit details by ID, including employee benefits if specified, and related company-specific information.
Retrieve company benefits by company ID, including active status, enrollment count, and benefit type.
Retrieve company details including home address, non-work locations, primary payroll admin, and primary signatory.
Retrieve company form details by form ID.
Retrieve compensation details by ID.
Retrieve compensations for a specific job, including details on how much is paid out and the active compensation.
Retrieve contractor details by UUID.
Retrieve contribution exclusions for a specific company benefit, indicating if they are excluded, for 401-k and Roth 401-k types.
Retrieve current pay schedule assignment for a company with mappings based on pay schedule type.
Retrieve custom fields for a specific company.
Retrieve data for active companies used to calculate invoices for Gusto Embedded Payroll, with pagination support.
Retrieve department details by UUID.
Retrieve details of a company's uploaded attachment.
Retrieve details of a specific benefit supported by Gusto, including high-level information and tax considerations.
Retrieve details of a specific garnishment by ID.
Retrieve details of a specific pay schedule for a company, including employee work times and payment schedule.
Retrieve earning types associated with a company in Gusto for payroll items, including default and custom earning types.
Retrieve employee benefits information by employee benefit ID.
Retrieve employee form data by employee ID and form ID.
Retrieve employee garnishments, which are fixed deductions from pay, including court-ordered payments or loan repayments.
Retrieve employee information with the option to include sensitive compensation data by specifying the appropriate scope.
Retrieve events within the last 30 days that your partner application is authorized to access.
Retrieve existing suspension records for a specific company.
Retrieve external payroll information for a specific company.
Retrieve external payroll information for a specific company.
Retrieve federal tax information for a specific employee based on their W-4 form type.
Retrieve field requirements for a specific benefit type.
Retrieve individual contractor payments within a specified time frame, including totals, for a specific company.
Retrieve industry classification details for a company by company ID.
Retrieve job details including compensation data by providing the job ID and including the necessary scope.
Retrieve location details by ID.
Retrieve minimum wages for a specific location based on the provided effective date.
Retrieve partner disbursements for a particular contractor payment group.
Retrieve partner disbursements for a specific payroll within a company.
Retrieve pay periods for a specific company to manage payroll information based on time periods.
Retrieve payment details for contractors in a specific company, including payment methods and bank account information for direct deposit.
Retrieve payment details for employees within a specific company, with optional filtering by employee or payroll. Results are paginated.
Retrieve payment speed configurations for a company, including 1-day, 2-day, or 4-day ACH options, fast payment limit, and partner-owned disbursement settings.
Retrieve possible I-9 verification document options for an employee based on their authorization status.
Retrieve reasons preventing company from running payrolls. View the Payroll Blockers guide for a full list.
Retrieve scope and resource details for the current access token.
Retrieve signatories associated with a specific company.
Retrieve summary benefit data for a specific company benefit ID, with restricted access to PHI data.
Retrieve tax liabilities from combined external payrolls for a specific company.
Retrieve tax requirements for a specific company.
Retrieve termination details for a specific employee by their ID.
Retrieve the complete employment history, including termination and rehire details, for a specific employee.
Retrieve the contractor's address for tax purposes, with geocoding for validity.
Retrieve the debit date based on the ACH payment speed of the company, considering different payment methods.
Retrieve the home addresses of an employee to determine tax information, supporting effective dating and courtesy withholding.
Retrieve the link to download the PDF form for a specific contractor and form ID.
Retrieve the link to view the PDF of a specific employee form.
Retrieve the payment method for a specific employee, including details like Check or Direct Deposit with split configuration.
Retrieve the PDF version of the contractor document by providing the document UUID.
Retrieve the Section 603 high earner status for a specific year of an employee, as per the SECURE 2.0 Act.
Retrieve the status and results of a people batch for batch processing status and result retrieval.
Retrieve the user acceptance status of the Gusto Embedded Payroll's Terms of Service for a specific company.
Retrieve the Webhook Subscription by UUID.
Retrieve the work address of an employee for payroll tax purposes.
Retrieve time off activities for a specific employee based on their unique identifier.
Retrieve time off policy details by UUID.
Retrieve unprocessed termination pay periods for past and future terminated employees in a company.
Retrieve year-to-date benefit amounts from a different company for a specific employee, focusing on 401(k) outside contributions.
Search for Bureau of Labor Statistics (BLS) occupations by name or keyword to find matching codes, titles, and descriptions.
Sign a company form with the company signatory.
Sign a contractor document.
Sign an employee form, with optional preparer attributes for I-9 form.
Sign an employee's Form I-9 as an employer, completing the I-9 authorization process without further modifications.
Simulate funding a contractor payment group to transition its status from 'Unfunded' to 'Funded'.
Simulate funding a contractor payment to transition its status from 'Unfunded' to 'Funded'.
Submit a $0 payroll to skip for employees on a specified pay schedule, transitioning it to the `processed` state.
Submit a wire in request for a payment scope of `payrolls:run`.
Submit an unprocessed payroll for calculation and running, transitioning it to the 'processed' state asynchronously.
Suspend a company to prevent payroll processing while retaining access to information like employee details and past payrolls.
Update a company benefit's details tied to a specific benefit type for employees, with restrictions based on data scope.
Update a company's holiday pay policy scope.
Update a company's industry classification using a NAICS code, with optional industry title and SIC codes.
Update a company's information.
Update a contractor's information, including type, with caution to avoid issues with 1099 filing.
Update a contractor's onboarding status based on different actions like self-onboarding, inviting, canceling, reviewing, or completing.
Update a contractor's payment method, including creating a contractor bank account.
Update a department's scope with write permissions.
Update a historical employee who was previously dismissed from the company in the current year.
Update a job by specifying the job ID.
Update a location with the specified location ID.
Update a pay schedule for a specific company with the provided details, considering version for optimistic concurrency.
Update a recurring reimbursement.
Update a Section 603 high earner status for an employee for a specific year, as per SECURE 2.0 Act.
Update a signatory for a company, whether invited or created, including starting the identity verification process.
Update a time off policy by its unique identifier.
Update an earning type for a specific company.
Update an employee's bank account details.
Update an employee's enrolled benefits for a specific company benefit type.
Update an employee's home address to calculate tax information, supporting effective dating and courtesy withholding.
Update an employee's I-9 verification documents with a complete list of new documents, removing any previous records.
Update an employee's information.
Update an employee's onboarding status based on specific actions, such as inviting, canceling, or completing onboarding.
Update an employee's payment method to Check or Direct Deposit with split configuration.
Update an employee's rehire status.
Update an employee's state taxes attributes with effective-dated format, specifying `valid_from` and `valid_up_to` dates.
Update an employee's work address for payroll tax purposes.
Update an existing salary estimate by modifying annual net revenue, ZIP code, and occupations.
Update an external payroll with a list of external payroll items.
Update attributes for a company's federal taxes, essential for onboarding with Gusto Embedded Payroll.
Update compensation details for a specific job based on the effective date.
Update contractor's address to determine tax information, with geocoding for validity. Only one address allowed per contractor.
Update contribution exclusions for a specific company benefit, limited to 401-k and Roth 401-k types.
Update employee information for a specific unprocessed payroll by providing values for fields included in the payroll object.
Update employee onboarding documents configuration to include/exclude Form I-9 for onboarding process.
Update federal tax (W4) information for an employee using the rev_2020_w4 format.
Update garnishment details, such as fixed amounts or percentages deducted from an employee's pay, including recurring deductions and maximum limits.
Update or create an employee's I-9 authorization with details like authorization status, signatures, and required Form I-9 information.
Update partner disbursements for a specific contractor payment group.
Update partner disbursements for a specific payroll.
Update payment speed, fast payment limit, and partner-owned disbursement for a company, with required parameters.
Update State Tax Requirements for a company by specifying tax requirements for a specific state.
Update tax liabilities for a company.
Update termination details for an employee, including effective date and payroll preference.
Update the Webhook Subscription by UUID.
Update time off hours balances for employees for a specific time off policy.
Upload a file to create a company attachment for a specific company ID.
Verify a company bank account by confirming two micro-deposits, with a maximum of 5 verification attempts.
Verify a webhook subscription by calling the `verify` endpoint with the `verification_token` before receiving webhook events.
